answer: Microsoft's 2025 annual revenue was $281.7 billion, a 15% increase from the previous year. Azure surpassed $75 billion in revenue for the first time, up 34%. The company's operating income grew 17% to $128.5 billion.

results.title: Microsoft Revenue 2012-2025 | MSFT - Macrotrends
results.snippet: * Microsoft annual revenue for 2025 was **$281.724B**, a **14.93% increase** from 2024. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2024 was **$245.122B**, a **15.67% increase** from 2023. * Microsoft annual revenue for 2023 was **$211.915B**, a **6.88% increase** from 2022. | Intuit (INTU) | United States | $97.052B | 20.83 |. | Adobe (ADBE) | United States | $91.086B | 12.68 |. | Synopsys (SNPS) | United States | $75.138B | 41.38 |. | Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) | United States | $73.347B | 48.30 |. | CommVault Systems (CVLT) | United States | $3.908B | 37.98 |. | Blackbaud (BLKB) | United States | $1.574B | 12.02 |. | Progress Software (PRGS) | United States | $1.121B | 5.56 |. | OptimizeRx (OPRX) | United States | $0.115B | 9.15 |. | NetSol Technologies (NTWK) | United States | $0.040B | 21.06 |. | Smith Micro Software (SMSI) | United States | $0.018B | 0.00 |.

results.title: Microsoft (MSFT) Q4 earnings report 2025 - CNBC
results.snippet: * The company reported revenue from Azure and cloud services for the first time, with sales exceeding $75 billion for fiscal 2025. Microsoft shares jumped 9% in extended trading on Wednesday after the company reported better-than-expected earnings and revenue for the fiscal fourth quarter. Microsoft's finance chief, Amy Hood, called for $74.7 billion to $75.8 billion in fiscal first-quarter revenue. Hood said Microsoft sees over $30 billion in fiscal first quarter capital expenditures and assets acquired through finance leases, which would work out to annual growth above 50%. The company's Intelligent Cloud unit, which includes the Azure cloud, produced $29.88 billion in revenue, up about 26% and beating the StreetAccount consensus of $28.92 billion. Microsoft had $24.2 billion in capital expenditures and assets acquired through finance leases for the quarter, up 27% from a year earlier. Microsoft said it had $1.71 billion in other expense during the quarter.
